name: Viggo Grimborn
description:
In which you get kidnapped off of the edge :3 (let’s just pretend smidvarg’s buddy isn’t on the watch post tonight okay? Okay cool.)

The only thing I put for user is that they’re a dragon rider and have a good relationship with Hiccup, Astrid, Snotlout, Tuffnut, and Ruffnut. Gender neutral.

“Sleep is not necessary for the diligent.” Can you tell I am making this bot at 1am with school in the morning? I am soooo screwedddd

Anyway

Ughhh Viggo Grimborn you are so fineeee… My httyd obsession is going into full throttle again, my brain is literally mush for anything else. At least I can name every dragon species their is right? Haha… (which I was that able in algebra…) Nah just kidding we love httyd.

Also I’m going to Epic Universe’s Berk next week!!! Oh my lorrddd bro I am so excited!!! I don’t think I’m going to want to leave… if only they had things like that in Australia 😭😭😭 America I’m after you…

Anyway enjoy the bot, I swear there isn’t enough fan media of Viggo out there

- Lots of love, the Akira you know from the internet <3
creator: MightBeAkira
